summary:
Created `.burn/output.json` to conduct dependency reconnaissance on the top 5 outdated packages with the largest semver gaps.

- @types/node (22.19.17 -> 25.9.1): Highlights include new global API typings (e.g., URLPattern) and cleanups of over 50 deprecated APIs. Migration risk is low-to-moderate, depending on legacy API usage.
- eslint (10.3.0 -> 10.4.0): Adds the `includeIgnoreFile()` helper to parse gitignore configurations and improves sequence expression checks. Migration risk is extremely low due to minor semver compatibility.
- @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin (8.59.1 -> 8.59.4): Patches a stack overflow issue in the `no-floating-promises` rule when encountering recursive types. Migration risk is zero.
- @typescript-eslint/parser (8.59.1 -> 8.59.4): Fixes TS Server config load error handling in project-service. Migration risk is zero.
- typescript-eslint (8.59.1 -> 8.59.4): Exports compatibility helper types for pnpm and TypeScript. Migration risk is zero.

follow_ups.task: Upgrade eslint to v10.4.0 to adopt the new includeIgnoreFile helper function.
Upgrade @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin, @typescript-eslint/parser, and typescript-eslint to v8.59.4 to fix the recursive type stack overflow bug.
